raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to review the section centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims for better conceptual clarity.","R1.2":"Reviewing requires checking the logical consistency of the argument from observations to experimental conclusions.","R1.3":"Assessing alignment between reported evidence like scores and kappa values and the claims is a central expectation.","R1.4":"Estimating the novelty of the DebiasJudge framework relative to existing bias mitigation methods is key to the review.","R1.5":"Evaluating and suggesting reorganizations to the section's structure and narrative flow is centrally requested.","R1.6":"Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels is a core part of reviewing the section.","R1.7":"Reviewing includes assessing scholarship such as attribution to prior observations on self-preference bias.","RX.1":"The review should highlight any undisclosed uncertainties in the experimental results or calibration effectiveness.","RX.2":"Identifying potential overclaims, such as fully eliminating bias, is central to responsible review of the section.","RX.3":"Ensuring claims adhere to the scope of the evaluated tasks and corpora is an expected review responsibility.","RX.4":"Assessing risks of downstream harms from biased LLM judgments in systems research is important in the review.","RX.5":"Verifying provenance of elements like the SysReview-Patch corpus and model instantiations supports traceability."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to review the section centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims for better conceptual clarity.
rationale.R1.2: Reviewing requires checking the logical consistency of the argument from observations to experimental conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: Assessing alignment between reported evidence like scores and kappa values and the claims is a central expectation.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating the novelty of the DebiasJudge framework relative to existing bias mitigation methods is key to the review.
rationale.R1.5: Evaluating and suggesting reorganizations to the section's structure and narrative flow is centrally requested.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels is a core part of reviewing the section.
rationale.R1.7: Reviewing includes assessing scholarship such as attribution to prior observations on self-preference bias.
rationale.RX.1: The review should highlight any undisclosed uncertainties in the experimental results or calibration effectiveness.
rationale.RX.2: Identifying potential overclaims, such as fully eliminating bias, is central to responsible review of the section.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring claims adhere to the scope of the evaluated tasks and corpora is an expected review responsibility.
rationale.RX.4: Assessing risks of downstream harms from biased LLM judgments in systems research is important in the review.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying provenance of elements like the SysReview-Patch corpus and model instantiations supports traceability.
